bullets.title: Ticket & Dashboard
bullets.text: A system built with Angular 16, MongoDB and FastAPI for tracking operations, employees and tasks.

bullets.title: Courier Locker App
bullets.text: A mobile solution written with Ionic and Cordova to speed up courier operations.

bullets.title: Eurodis Cargonet Integration
bullets.text: Migrating legacy data formats like MIP, TIF and CIF to modern infrastructure with .NET, C# and LINQ.

bullets.title: Maps & Microservices
bullets.text: Map-based applications in containerized architecture using Leaflet.js, Docker, Kafka, Redis and Graylog.

bullets.title: Geospatial Data Tools
bullets.text: Polygon drawing and location systems built with Leaflet.js, MongoDB and C#.

bullets.title: Notification & SMS System
bullets.text: Real-time notification infrastructure based on C# microservices, tested with Postman.

bullets.title: Task Management Panel
bullets.text: Reporting systems built with LINQ queries for tracking employee performance.

bullets.title: ETL Processes
bullets.text: Data migration from MongoDB to PostgreSQL with Airflow and Python, plus Metabase reporting.

bullets.title: Text Mining & NLP
bullets.text: Text classification, data scraping and chatbot systems with Python, TensorFlow, scikit-learn and spaCy.

avatar-chatbot.title: Industry-Based Avatar Chatbot
avatar-chatbot.subtitle: Voice & Text AI Assistant System
avatar-chatbot.shortDescription: A web-based voice and text Avatar Chatbot that works in 4 languages and delivers industry-focused answers.
avatar-chatbot.description: A multilingual avatar chatbot trained on industry-specific knowledge bases, supporting both voice and text communication. It engages with users in real time to produce accurate, contextual answers to sector-specific questions. Built with a TensorFlow and NLTK-based NLP engine, an Angular frontend and a FastAPI backend, it delivers an enterprise-ready solution.
details: Multilingual experience supporting 4 languages (Turkish, English, German, French)
Natural language understanding and intent classification engine based on TensorFlow and NLTK
Contextual and accurate responses powered by an industry-specific knowledge base
Real-time voice interaction through a modern Angular-based web interface
High-performance, async backend infrastructure built with FastAPI and Python
Visual and immersive user experience through avatar animation integration
